item.title: OpenAI 发布 Presence：助力企业部署和管理实时语音 Agent 与聊天机器人
item.summary: OpenAI has announced Presence, a new enterprise product for deploying and managing AI agents across customer-facing and internal business workflows. The offering is designed for eligible enterprise customers that want agents to answer questions, access company systems, take approved actions and escalate to human worker
